---
title: "People"
title-block-banner: images/headers/new_website_header_01.jpg
format: html
listing: 
  - id: current-members
    contents: "listings/ind_profiles/current/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: category_order
    fields: [image, name, research, location, dates]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 140px
    page-size: 0
  - id: alumni-members
    contents: "listings/ind_profiles/alumni/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: sorting_code
    fields: [image, name, research, location, dates]
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 120px
    page-size: 0
---

## Current Members

::: {#current-members}
:::

## Alumni Members

::: {#alumni-members}
:::
